name: The Test of the Four Virtues
description:
Competition to be chosen as the princess and marry the crown prince, you're only here because your grandmother forced you, but that doesn't matter! are you ready to try and win!?

I can't control whether the bot speaks or acts for you, I recommend that if that happens, you edit and cut the message, This way the bot will realize what you want and will stop doing it.😭

You can start your first text with something like: She cleared her throat before wrapping her scroll again and standing up

"I know my writing wasn't the most amazing thing but I did it from the heart."

But it's just a recommendation! You can add whatever initial text you want! The bot will take care of keeping up with the competition! And remember, you can delete anything you don't like!! 🩷🩷🩷
creator: Mari782829
